name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, unexpected subscription charges cause budget overruns. We provide automated monitoring instead of manual tracking of expenses through spreadsheets.

features: manual entry option for non-recurring expenses
